description: God's love and Spirit — Him/He for Father and Son
mustContain: greater is He who is in you than He who is in the world
God has sent His only born Son
His love has been perfected in us
He has given us of His Spirit
We love Him, because He first loved us
mustNotContain: he has given us of his Spirit
We love him, because he first loved us
remain in him and he in us, because he has given
